# canvas
Description: Asia's design studio. Use when the user asks for design work — mockups, pitch decks, hero sections, posters, landing pages, wireframes, brand explorations. Generates polished HTML artifacts that render in a sandboxed iframe, with a 5-dimension self-critique. The /canvas dashboard tab is the workspace view; this skill is the engine both surfaces consume.
Source: project
Triggers: design, mockup, deck, pitch deck, poster, wireframe, landing page, hero section, canvas, brand kit, mood board
Tools: canvas.generate, canvas.critique, canvas.iterate, canvas.export
## What this skill does

Generates production-quality design artifacts (HTML/CSS in a single self-contained document) from a natural-language brief, then critiques them across five design dimensions. The workspace surface lives at `/canvas` in the dashboard.

## Public API

The skill exposes four functions (see `src/skills/canvas/index.ts` and the
ASAGI brief §5 in `docs/specs/design-tab-ASAGI-brief.md`):

- `generate(brief, opts?)` — async iterable of SSE events ending with a finished `Artifact`.
- `critique(artifactId, { multiAgent? })` — 5-dimension scoring; multi-agent mode fans out to Asia + Lucius + Joker and merges.
- `iterate(artifactId, instruction)` — async iterable; modifies an existing artifact.
- `exportArtifact(artifactId, format)` — `html`, `pdf`, `pptx`, `zip`, `mp4`. v1 ships HTML/ZIP only; PDF/PPTX/MP4 require installing the opt-in `huashu-design` skill.

## HTTP routes (workspace surface)

| Method | Route | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| GET    | `/api/canvas/directions`         | Curated visual schools |
| GET    | `/api/canvas/projects`           | Project history |
| GET    | `/api/canvas/projects/:id`       | One full project |
| DELETE | `/api/canvas/projects/:id`       | Delete |
| POST   | `/api/canvas/generate`           | SSE stream of `CanvasEvent`s |
| POST   | `/api/canvas/iterate`            | SSE stream |
| POST   | `/api/canvas/critique`           | Returns `CritiqueResult` |
| POST   | `/api/canvas/export`             | Returns `{ url, bytes }` |
| GET    | `/api/canvas/artifact/:id/file`  | Raw HTML for the sandboxed iframe |

## Security (non-negotiable, §7 of the brief)

- The artifact iframe **must** use `sandbox="allow-scripts"` and **never** `allow-same-origin`. The artifact is user-controlled HTML.
- The raw-artifact route ships a strict CSP: no `connect-src`, only inline styles/scripts and Google Fonts.
- Project storage is scoped to `.canvas-projects/<projectId>/`; no path traversal.

## Visual directions

v1 ships 9 curated schools (editorial minimalism, Linear/Vercel, Stripe modern, Anthropic Library, Field.io motion, Apple marketing, Sagmeister experimental, Figma/Notion playful, NeuroClaw house). See `src/skills/canvas/directions.ts`. Phase 5 of the brief expands to 20.

## When to invoke from a chat agent

Match this regex on the user's message: `/design|mockup|deck|poster|wireframe|landing page|hero section|canvas/i`. Default agent is Asia. F.R.I.D.A.Y can be wired as a hand-off ("now build this in React") in Phase 3 of the brief.

## Out of scope for v1

- Real-time multi-user editing
- Public sharing URLs
- Figma import/export
- Built-in PDF/PPTX/MP4 export (deferred to opt-in `huashu-design` skill)

## License

- NeuroClaw canvas engine: project license.
- Optional `huashu-design` skill (Personal-Use only): not bundled. The user installs it explicitly via the Skills page if they want PDF/PPTX/MP4 export.
- Optional `open-design` chassis (Apache-2.0): not vendored in this repo yet.
